name: 5B Unit 2 - The Missing Ring
description: 關於 The Missing Ring 的閱讀理解問答
creator: 系統預置

questions.question: Where did Henry think he put the ring?
questions.answer: He thought he put it in his pocket.

questions.question: What did Billy see?
questions.answer: He saw a woman with a diamond ring.

questions.question: What happened after Eddy gave Henry the box with the ring?
questions.answer: Henry helped his mum put on her sweater.

questions.question: Where did Henry leave the box?
questions.answer: He left the box on the chair.
